calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a One Adult and Three Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Muhameed Hanif Shaikh was present in pro per on behalf of himself, and as Guardian Ad Litem for the minors, Muhammed Hunair Shaikh, Muhammed Faizan Shaikh and Mohammed Farhan Shaikh.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Hanif Shaikh.

Additionally, the Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Hunair Shaikh, Faizan Shaikh and Farhan Shaikh.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
